summary: Complete testing of Sandoval Abogados law firm website - both backend APIs and frontend functionality tested successfully

flaky_endpoints.issue: Resend API configuration issue - can only send to verified domain email
flaky_endpoints.impact: Contact form emails may not reach intended recipients
flaky_endpoints.details: Error: You can only send testing emails to your own email address (naikolast@gmail.com). Need domain verification at resend.com/domains

design_issues.issue: Some navigation links not clickable when mobile menu is open
design_issues.note: Navigation scrolling works but some link interactions have minor issues

passed_tests: Hero section loads with correct title, subtitle, CTAs and trust bar
All navigation links present and functional
Services grid - 8/8 legal practice areas present
Why Us section - 4/4 pillars with statistics display correctly
Team section - 4/4 team members with photos and credentials
FAQ accordion - 6/6 items with working accordion functionality
Contact form - all 5 fields functional with validation
WhatsApp integration - floating button and contact section button working
Mobile responsive design - all sections adapt to mobile viewport
No Emergent branding found anywhere on site
Form validation working (422 error for invalid data)

success_percentage.backend: 80% (4/5 tests passed - contact email has config issue)
success_percentage.frontend: 95% (all major functionality working, minor mobile navigation issue)

high_priority: Configure Resend API domain verification at resend.com/domains to enable contact form emails to reach contacto@sandovalabogados.cl
medium_priority: Fix mobile menu navigation link click handlers for better mobile UX
